mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SURVEY (svnum, code, sub, sdate) VALUES(survey_seq.nextVal,#{code},#{sub},sysdate)

INSERT ALL
INTO SURVEY_QUESTIONS (SVNUM, QUESTIONS_ID, QUESTIONS_TEXT) VALUES (SURVEY_SEQ.CURRVAL, #{item.questions_id}, #{item.questions_text})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL
INTO SURVEY_RESULT (MNUM, SVNUM, QUESTIONS_ID, RATING, REQUEST, RESDATE) VALUES (#{item.mnum}, #{item.svnum}, #{item.questions_id}, #{item.rating}, #{item.request}, SYSDATE)
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT svnum, code, sub, sdate FROM SURVEY WHERE SVNUM = (SELECT MAX(SVNUM) FROM SURVEY)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SURVEY WHERE SVNUM = (SELECT MIN(SVNUM) FROM SURVEY) PURGE
